{"query":"Microsoft 365 Copilot Bing interactive answer cards weather stocks display chat integration 2025","model":"mako","response_time_ms":2144,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://support.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365-copilot/get-instant-answers-with-microsoft-365-copilot-chat","title":"Get instant answers with Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat | Microsoft Support","content":"Get instant answers with Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat
To learn how to use voice capabilities in Copilot, see Get started with voice features in Microsoft 365 Copilot.
You want simple questions answered quickly, using information buried in your organization's data."},{"url":"https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/blog/2023/07/18/introducing-bing-chat-enterprise-microsoft-365-copilot-pricing-and-microsoft-sales-copilot/","title":"Introducing Bing Chat Enterprise, Copilot for Microsoft 365 pricing, and Microsoft Sales Copilot | Microsoft 365 Blog","content":"Just like Bing Chat, Bing Chat Enterprise is grounded in web data and provides complete, verifiable answers with citations, along with visual answers that include graphs, charts, and images, and is designed in line with our AI principles.
You can access Bing Chat Enterprise using your work account wherever Bing Chat is supported—Bing.com/chat and the Microsoft Edge sidebar.
Copilot for Microsoft 365 will be available for commercial customers for USD30 per user per month for Microsoft 365 E3, E5, Business Standard, and Business Premium customers when broadly available.
Sales Copilot can be accessed in the tools where sellers work—whether that’s Outlook, Microsoft Teams, or Microsoft Dynamics 365 Sales—and connects to other CRM systems like Salesforce.
These copilot capabilities are available on calls with other Teams users, or when making calls from your Teams Phone number.
Copilot in Viva will help boost engagement and performance and will be included in the Viva suite at no additional cost when it’s available in preview later this year.
And a new integration with BetterUp will deliver science-backed coaching tools to millions of Microsoft Viva users directly through the Viva Digest emails.
Bing Chat Enterprise is included at no additional cost in Microsoft 365 E3, Microsoft 365 E5, Business Standard, and Business Premium.
## Learn more about Microsoft Inspire 2023 announcements"},{"url":"https://blogs.bing.com/search/december-2023/Microsoft-Copilot-is-now-generally-available","title":"Microsoft Copilot is now generally available | Bing Search Blog","content":"We’re excited to keep this momentum going by announcing that Copilot is now generally available and no longer in preview.
Copilot offers access to powerful AI models such as GPT-4 and up-to-date information with cited sources.
Copilot offers commercial data protection at no additional cost when users with eligible Microsoft 365 licenses sign in with their work account.
Current eligible licenses include Microsoft 365 E3, E5, Microsoft 365 A3, A5 (faculty only), Microsoft 365 F3, Business Standard, and Business Premium.
You can also learn more about the latest Copilot updates, which can be leveraged in Microsoft Edge for Business, in this Microsoft Ignite video.
Keeping your organization safe while introducing AI is top of mind, and Copilot with Entra ID sign-in is here as a clear path forward."}]}

Starting today, Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat and agents are rolling out in Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook, and OneNote for all users—creating a unified chat experience across the apps millions of people use every day at work. Copilot Chat is secure AI chat grounded in the web—and now, it’s available in the Microsoft 365 apps. The moment you need it, you can pull up Copilot Chat in a side pane of your file, and it will be ready to help right where you’re working—which means less copy and pasting, file uploading, and switching apps. And now, it’s all unified in one consistent, in-app experience in the apps you use every day.
